name: Texas Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the corn meal, flour, and salt together.
2. Add the buttermilk, sweet milk, beaten egg, melted butter, and baking soda to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined; do not overmix.
3. Let the batter stand for at least 5 minutes before proceeding.
4. Grease a hot cast-iron skillet or Dutch oven with shortening or oil.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared skillet, spreading it evenly.
6. Bake on direct heat (coals) until the top is a golden brown color and the edges are crispy, about 12-15 minutes.
7. The bottom of the cornbread may remain moist; this is normal and desired.
This recipe remains true to the original while ensuring clarity and consistency in presentation.
